tool.name: crYOLO Predict
tool.description: Pick particles using a trained crYOLO model
tool.command:
#import re mkdir -p input_micrographs && #for $m in $micrographs: #set $clean_name = re.sub('[^\w\-\.]', '_', str($m.element_identifier)) ln -s '$m' 'input_micrographs/$clean_name' && #end for
cryolo_predict.py --conf '$conf' --weights '$weights' --input 'input_micrographs' --output 'output_dir' --threshold $threshold --distance $distance #if $size_opts.minsize: --minsize $size_opts.minsize #end if #if $size_opts.maxsize: --maxsize $size_opts.maxsize #end if --prediction_batch_size $pbs #if str($gpu_opts.gpu) != "": --gpu '$gpu_opts.gpu' --gpu_fraction $gpu_opts.gpu_fraction #else: --gpu -1 #end if #if $num_cpu != -1: --num_cpu $num_cpu #end if $skip $otf $write_empty
## Filament options #if str($picking_mode.mode) == 'filament': --filament --box_distance $picking_mode.box_distance #if $picking_mode.minimum_number_boxes: --minimum_number_boxes $picking_mode.minimum_number_boxes #end if --straightness_method $picking_mode.straightness_method --straightness_threshold $picking_mode.straightness_threshold --search_range_factor $picking_mode.search_range_factor --angle_delta $picking_mode.angle_delta --directional_method $picking_mode.directional_method #if str($picking_mode.directional_method) == 'CONVOLUTION' and $picking_mode.filament_width: --filament_width $picking_mode.filament_width #end if --mask_width $picking_mode.mask_width #if $picking_mode.nomerging: --nomerging #end if #end if
## Tomography options #if str($picking_mode.mode) == 'tomography': --tomogram --tracing_search_range $picking_mode.tracing_search_range --tracing_memory $picking_mode.tracing_memory --minimum_number_boxes_3d $picking_mode.minimum_number_boxes_3d --tracing_min_length $picking_mode.tracing_min_length --tracing_window_size $picking_mode.tracing_window_size --tracing_min_edge_weight $picking_mode.tracing_min_edge_weight --tracing_merge_thresh $picking_mode.tracing_merge_thresh #end if

param.name: micrographs
param.label: Micrograph Images
param.help: Select one or more micrographs / dataset collections.

param.name: threshold
param.label: Confidence Threshold
param.help: Pick confidence cutoff. The higher, the more conservative.

param.name: distance
param.label: Minimum Distance Filter (Pixels)
param.help: Detected particles closer than this distance will be filtered out.

param.name: pbs
param.label: Prediction Batch Size
param.help: Number of images processed in parallel. Reduce this if running out of GPU memory.

param.name: num_cpu
param.label: Number of CPUs to use
param.help: Set to -1 to use all available CPU cores.

param.name: minsize
param.label: Minimum Estimated Diameter (Pixels)
param.help: Filter out particles smaller than this size.

param.name: maxsize
param.label: Maximum Estimated Diameter (Pixels)
param.help: Filter out particles larger than this size.

param.name: skip
param.label: Skip Picked
param.help: Skip picking for micrographs that already have boxes.

param.name: otf
param.label: On-the-fly Filtering
param.help: Perform filtering in memory (micrographs won't be written to disk).

param.name: write_empty
param.label: Write Empty Coordinate Files
param.help: Create coordinate files even when no particles are detected.

param.name: box_distance
param.label: Box Distance (Pixels)
param.help: Spacing between boxes along a filament.

param.name: minimum_number_boxes
param.label: Minimum Boxes per Filament
param.help: Discard filaments with fewer boxes than this limit.

param.name: search_range_factor
param.label: Search Range Factor
param.help: Search range is box size times this factor.

param.name: angle_delta
param.label: Angle Delta (Degrees)
param.help: Allowed angular deviation for straight filaments.

param.name: filament_width
param.label: Filament Width (Pixels)
param.help: Required only for Convolution method.

param.name: mask_width
param.label: Mask Width
param.help: Required only for Convolution method.

param.name: tracing_search_range
param.label: Tracing Search Range (Pixels)
param.help: Defaults to -1 (25% of box size).

param.name: tracing_memory
param.label: Tracing Memory
param.help: Max slices a particle can vanish and reappear.

param.name: tracing_min_length
param.label: Minimum Trace Length (Particles)
param.help: Minimum number of slice picks to count as a 3D particle.

param.name: tracing_window_size
param.label: Tracing Window Size
param.help: Window width when averaging filament positions. Default (-1) uses box size.

param.name: tracing_min_edge_weight
param.label: Tracing Min Edge Weight
param.help: Minimum overlap fraction between slices.

param.name: tracing_merge_thresh
param.label: Tracing Merge Threshold
param.help: Threshold above which overlapping filaments are merged.

tool.help:
**What it does**
This tool executes the crYOLO prediction/picking pipeline. It supports SPA particle picking, Helical Filament Tracing, and 3D Tomography linking, outputting coordinate files in EMAN, STAR, and CBOX formats.
